Assembly: The assembly ilCraPont1.hap2.1 is based on 100x PacBio data and Arima2 Hi-C data generated by Project Psyche (https://www.projectpsyche.org/). The assembly process included the following sequence of steps: initial PacBio assembly generation with Hifiasm in Hi-C integrated assembly mode, and Hi-C based scaffolding with YaHS. The mitochondrial genome was assembled using MitoHiFi. Finally, each haplotype assembly was analysed and manually improved using TreeVal. Chromosome-scale scaffolds confirmed by the Hi-C data have been named in order of size. This genome has been assembled using PacBio and HiC data and phased. The result is two curated haplotypes. Z chromosome identified based BUSCO gene painting with ancestral Merian elements (https://doi.org/10.1038/s41559-024-02329-4). The exact order and orientation of the contigs on chromosome 11 (0 - 1.8 Mbp) are unknown.

Assembly: The assembly dhCorColu1.hap1.1 is based on 49x PacBio data and Arima2 Hi-C data generated by the Darwin Tree of Life Project~(https://www.darwintreeoflife.org/). The assembly process included the following sequence of steps: initial PacBio assembly generation with Hifiasm in Hi-C integrated assembly mode, and Hi-C based scaffolding with YaHS. The mitochondrial and chloroplast genomes were assembled using OATK. Finally, each haplotype assembly was analysed and manually improved using TreeVal. Chromosome-scale scaffolds confirmed by the Hi-C data have been named in order of size. The scaffolds making up the following regions of the following chromosomes are of uncertain order and orientation: Chromosome 1 ~29.3-34 Mbp, Chromosome 2 ~14.6-17.6 Mbp, Chromosome 3 ~17.5-20 Mbp, Chromosome 5 ~13.8-15.8 Mbp, Chromosome 7 ~11.9-14.5 Mbp, Chromosome 10 ~11.3-13.9 Mbp, Chromosome 11 ~9.8-11.1 Mbp.

Taxonomy_x: Eukaryota; Metazoa; Ecdysozoa; Arthropoda; Hexapoda; Insecta; Pterygota; Neoptera; Endopterygota; Lepidoptera; Glossata; Ditrysia; Geometroidea; Geometridae; Ennominae; Agriopis
Taxonomy_y: Eukaryota; Metazoa; Ecdysozoa; Arthropoda; Hexapoda; Insecta; Pterygota; Neoptera; Endopterygota; Lepidoptera; Glossata; Ditrysia; Geometroidea; Geometridae; Ennominae; Agriopis
Assembly: The assembly ilAgrAura1.1 is based on 35x PacBio data, 10X Genomics Chromium data, and Arima Hi-C data generated by the Darwin Tree of Life Project (https://www.darwintreeoflife.org/). The assembly process included the following sequence of steps: initial PacBio assembly generation with Hifiasm, retained haplotig separation with purge_dups, short-read polishing using FreeBayes-called variants from 10X Genomics Chromium reads aligned with LongRanger, and Hi-C based scaffolding with SALSA2. The mitochondrial genome was assembled using MitoHifi. Finally, the assembly was analysed and manually improved using rapid curation. Chromosome-scale scaffolds confirmed by the Hi-C data have been named in order of size.
